---
pagetitle: "Resources | Cultural Health Connect"
description: "Free multilingual health resources: downloadable pamphlets from Cultural Health Connect plus trusted health information in English, Spanish, and Arabic."
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <div class="page-h1" role="heading" aria-level="1" data-i18n="page-header-resources">Resources</div>
  <p class="page-sub" data-i18n="resources-sub">Free, multilingual materials to support healthier living—created by CHC and curated from trusted health organizations.</p>
</div>

<div class="container section">
  <p style="font-size:1.05rem;" data-i18n="resources-intro">
    Below you'll find free, downloadable resources created by Cultural Health Connect to support healthier living in our community. All materials are available in English, Spanish, and Arabic.
  </p>

  <div class="resource-card chc-reveal">
    <div class="resource-info">
      <h3 data-i18n="pamphlet-title">Multilingual Health Pamphlet</h3>
      <p data-i18n="pamphlet-desc">Our community health pamphlet covering chronic disease prevention, culturally adapted dietary guidance, and lifestyle tips.</p>
      <p style="margin-top:1rem;">
        <a class="btn" href="MultiLingual%20Cultural%20Health%20Connect.pdf" download data-i18n="btn-download">⬇ Download Pamphlet (PDF)</a>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="pdf-viewer-wrap chc-reveal">
    <iframe
      src="MultiLingual%20Cultural%20Health%20Connect.pdf"
      class="pdf-viewer"
      title="Multilingual Health Pamphlet">
      <p>Your browser doesn't support embedded PDFs.
        <a href="MultiLingual%20Cultural%20Health%20Connect.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Click here to view the PDF.</a>
      </p>
    </iframe>
  </div>
</div>

<div class="container-wide section chc-reveal">
  <p class="section-kicker" data-i18n="trusted-kicker">Trusted Sources</p>
  <h2 class="section-heading" data-i18n="trusted-heading">More Free Health Information We Recommend</h2>
  <p data-i18n="trusted-intro">These organizations publish reliable, free health information—much of it available in Spanish and Arabic. We link to them because we trust their science.</p>

  <div class="reslink-grid">
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://www.cdc.gov/diabetes/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-cdc-title">CDC — Diabetes</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-cdc-desc">Prevention, management, and healthy eating guidance from the U.S. Centers for Disease Control and Prevention.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">EN · ES</span>
    </a>
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://diabetes.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-ada-title">American Diabetes Association</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-ada-desc">Practical tools for living with diabetes, including food, fitness, and blood sugar guidance.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">EN · ES</span>
    </a>
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://www.heart.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-aha-title">American Heart Association</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-aha-desc">Heart health, blood pressure, and lifestyle resources from the leading U.S. heart health organization.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">EN · ES</span>
    </a>
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://www.myplate.gov/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-myplate-title">MyPlate (USDA)</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-myplate-desc">Simple, visual guidance for building balanced meals on any budget, with recipes and meal plans.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">EN · ES</span>
    </a>
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://medlineplus.gov/languages/arabic.html" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-medline-ar-title">MedlinePlus in Arabic</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-medline-ar-desc">Health information in Arabic from the U.S. National Library of Medicine, covering many conditions and topics.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">AR</span>
    </a>
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://medlineplus.gov/spanish/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-medline-es-title">MedlinePlus en Español</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-medline-es-desc">Comprehensive health information in Spanish from the U.S. National Library of Medicine.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">ES</span>
    </a>
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://211sandiego.org/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-211-title">2-1-1 San Diego</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-211-desc">Free, confidential connection to local health care, food assistance, and community services—24/7, in many languages. Dial 2-1-1.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">EN · ES · AR +</span>
    </a>
    <a class="reslink-card" href="https://www.niddk.nih.gov/health-information/diabetes" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      <h3 data-i18n="res-niddk-title">NIDDK — Diabetes Information</h3>
      <p data-i18n="res-niddk-desc">In-depth, research-backed information on diabetes from the U.S. National Institutes of Health.</p>
      <span class="reslink-langs">EN · ES</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <div class="footer-links">
    <a href="about.html" data-i18n="nav-about">About</a>
    <a href="Programs.html" data-i18n="nav-programs">Programs</a>
    <a href="Resources.html" data-i18n="nav-resources">Resources</a>
    <a href="FAQ.html" data-i18n="nav-faq">FAQ</a>
    <a href="Contact.html" data-i18n="nav-contact">Contact</a>
  </div>
  <span data-i18n="footer-short">© 2025 Cultural Health Connect</span>
  <span class="footer-disclaimer" data-i18n="footer-disclaimer">The content on this website is for general educational purposes only and is not medical advice. Always consult your doctor or another qualified health provider with questions about a medical condition.</span>
</footer>
```
